title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness that enables building agent workflows. It serves as the infrastructure for Cole Medin's AI Dark Factory, which uses agents to self-generate and ship code. The harness supports combining multiple models for different reasoning stages.
